title: alter sequence restart on large integer
bug_features_seed: CREATE SEQUENCE test_seq START WITH 9223372036854775807 INCREMENT BY 1;
CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT NEXTVAL(test_seq) AS next_value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_table) AS total_rows;
key_bug_features: alter sequence restart on large integer values
